title: Pvssentials
description: Pvssentials — optimized Fabric client for Minecraft 1.21.11 with shaders, voice chat, emotes, PvP HUD, and high FPS. Works for both PvP and vanilla survival.
body:
# ![Pvssentials Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c0544a1374d4549bdc8ce01675626cc7b9a9d62.png) — Fabric build for Minecraft 1.21.11

**Pvssentials** is a complete, optimized client build for **Minecraft 1.21.11** on **Fabric**. It’s designed for players who want high FPS, beautiful graphics, voice chat, emotes, and a clean HUD — whether you're into competitive PvP or just exploring in vanilla survival.

---

## ✨ What makes Pvssentials special?

- **🎮 Ready for both PvP and survival** — no need to switch modpacks. Combat utilities work when you need them but don't get in the way during peaceful building or exploration.
- **⚡ Maximum performance** — Lithium, Entity Culling, and ImmediatelyFast give you stable FPS even on modest PCs.
- **🎨 Shaders and visual enhancements** — Iris Shaders pre-configured, Continuity for connected textures, CIT Resewn for custom items, and EMF/ETF for better entity models.
- **🎙️ Built-in voice chat** — Plasmo Voice lets you talk with friends on any server that supports it (server plugin included).
- **💃 Emotes** — Emotecraft adds animations to bring your character to life.
- **🛡️ PvP HUD** — Armor Hood, Combat Hitboxes, Crosshair Indicator, and Jade give you clear combat info without cluttering your screen.
- **🗺️ Full map and waypoints** — JourneyMap included for navigation and marking important locations.
- **💬 Smooth UI** — Chat animations, chat heads, AppleSkin (food value display), and dynamic lighting with LambDynamicLights.

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

| Parameter | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| Minecraft | 1.21.11 |
| Loader | Fabric |
| RAM | 4 GB (without shaders) / 6 GB (with shaders) |

---

> ## 🔥 Important
>
> ### Server setup
>
> If you run a server, install **only** these two plugins on it:
>
> - [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice?version=1.21.11)
> - [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/plugin/emotecraft?version=1.21.11)
>
> ### Client-side only
>
> All other mods (optimization, HUD, graphics, shaders, maps, libraries) are **client-side only**. Do not add them to your server — they will cause crashes.

![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c03f885371490cc23fc9b3ea8efb59ba758de597_0.webp)
